creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
Created attachment 256256
ocaml-zip.patch

Dear maintainer of ocaml-zip,

Please provide feedback to the attached patch.
You do not need to commit it, it is part of a larger submission to update OCaml: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D48228

USE_OCAML_WASH=yes should be removed as it does nothing meaningful.
the version field is missing in the META file.

Thanks in advance for your reaction,

Benjamin
